name: kiro-ci-recipes
description: Installable Kiro CLI headless-mode CI use cases.

useCases.title: Advisory PR Review
useCases.summary: Post normalized Kiro findings as an advisory pull request review.

useCases.title: Security Gate
useCases.summary: Run strict security review and fail on normalized critical findings.

useCases.title: Manual Artifact Review
useCases.summary: Run Kiro manually and upload normalized markdown/JSON artifacts.

useCases.title: Promote Review Finding to Issue
useCases.summary: Create a GitHub issue from a selected normalized Kiro review finding.

useCases.title: Test Gap Finder
useCases.summary: Ask Kiro to identify changed behavior that is not covered by tests.

useCases.title: Docs Drift Check
useCases.summary: Ask Kiro to flag code/API/CLI changes that should update docs.

useCases.title: Auto-Fix Branch
useCases.summary: Opt-in workflow that creates a standalone branch for a selected finding.
